summary: I finally updated my homepage! It’s not really flashy in any way, but it has a lot of links to what I’ve done over the last years. As part of it, I restored some of my “classic” Twitter and other social media threads, too. If you like my work, chances are you will find here something you enjoy.
title: The new homepage
